##RRUFFID=R130002

##LOCALITY=Huanggang(?), Inner Mongolia, China
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Robert Lavinsky
##DESCRIPTION=Colorless, striated, prismatic crystals associated with black vesuvianite

##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
